title: dracaena angustifolia
intro: Dracaena angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leafed dracaena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Dracaena angustifolia include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
